subcodes.first_line: O Ardashir, lion of the world! Praise be to God, thou hast attained unto the sanctified throne of supreme spirituality and circumambulated the sacred dust [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای اردشیر جهان شیر الحمد لله بمقر سریر روحانیت کبری رسیدی و تربت پاک را طواف
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @prayer for specific individuals; groups
